title: ADT declarations + payloads
manager: Algebraic data types — named sum types whose variants carry typed payloads, like `Shape = Circle(r) | Rect(w, h)` — the single most important modeling tool for "this is one of several shapes of thing, each with its own data." Combined with exhaustive `case`, ADTs are how FSL makes illegal states unrepresentable and forces every variant to be handled, so adding a case later can't silently fall through.
cs: sum-type declarations with per-variant typed payloads; construct + pattern-match (W6.41); exhaustiveness-checked; value equality.
